Minimum version requirements for dependencies in the Flask codebase.

# Purpose
The file specifies the dependencies for a Python project, listing the required packages and their exact versions. The packages include `werkzeug`, `jinja2`, `markupsafe`, `itsdangerous`, `click`, and `blinker`, each followed by their respective version numbers. This ensures that the project uses consistent versions of these libraries, which can help maintain compatibility and stability.
